name: G Pen Micro+ Mouthpiece Assembly
summary: Upgrade your vaping experience with the G Pen Micro+ Replacement Mouthpiece, crafted for comfort, durability, and maximum airflow.
description: Upgrade your vaping experience with the G Pen Micro+ Replacement Mouthpiece, crafted for comfort, durability, and maximum airflow. Featuring a high-quality silicone sleeve and an internal ceramic air path, this mouthpiece ensures smooth, flavorful draws while preserving the natural taste of your concentrates. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
